Event: Combat Hustle
Event Date: 10/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T156


Other locations the gear can be found
special offer
Stone Destroyer Elder Totem

Once in a while, the unit removes 5 shields, damage-reducing or damage-blocking effects from 3 random enemy units and turns them into rocks for 3 sec. For that duration, the targets are unable to move, take 30% more damage, and receive 125000 magic damage every second. When the effect wears off, the targets explode, receiving 112500 pure damage, and their physical and magic armor is reduced by 20% for 2 sec. Rocks are also launched at 2 nearest enemy units. When they hit, they deal 100000 physical damage to the targets and stun them for 1 sec.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit removes 5 shields, damage-reducing or damage-blocking effects from 3 random enemy units and turns them into rocks for 3 sec. For that duration, the targets are unable to move, take 35% more damage, and receive 250000 magic damage every second. When the effect wears off, the targets explode, receiving 225000 pure damage, and their physical and magic armor is reduced by 25% for 2,5 sec. Rocks are also launched at 2 nearest enemy units. When they hit, they deal 200000 physical damage to the targets and stun them for 1,5 sec.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit removes 5 shields, damage-reducing or damage-blocking effects from 3 random enemy units and turns them into rocks for 3 sec. For that duration, the targets are unable to move, take 40% more damage, and receive 500000 magic damage every second. When the effect wears off, the targets explode, receiving 450000 pure damage, and their physical and magic armoris reduced by 30% for 3 sec. Rocks are also launched at 2 nearest enemy units. When they hit, they deal 400000 physical damage to the targets and stun them for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90
